title: The DL Tower and a Hong Kong Coliseum Concert Go On-Chain: Compliance Reflections Amid Hong Kong’s RWA Boom
author: fintax
keyword: RWA, Hong Kong, compliance, tokenisation, tax
digest: At the start of 2026, high-quality commercial real estate and a Hong Kong Coliseum concert went on-chain in quick succession. This article reviews Hong Kong’s RWA evolution, examines tax implications and regulatory logic, and explores compliance risks behind the RWA financing boom.

title: 中环大厦、红馆演唱会接连上链？赴港RWA热潮下的合规冷思考
author: fintax
keyword: RWA, 香港监管, 代币化, 合规, 资产证券化, 真实世界资产
digest: 2026年开年，香港中环商业地产与红馆演唱会接连上链，标志着RWA正式迈入商业化落地新阶段。本文系统梳理香港RWA演进路径，剖析税务影响与监管逻辑，审视RWA融资红利背后的合规风险。

title: From Regulation by Enforcement to Ex Ante Rulemaking: The U.S. Crypto Regulatory Shift and Its Market Impact
author: fintax
keyword: crypto regulation, SEC, CFTC, digital assets, ex ante rulemaking, digital commodities, digital securities, stablecoins
digest: The SEC and CFTC jointly released guidance classifying crypto assets into five categories, marking a historic shift from regulation by enforcement to systematic ex ante rulemaking in the U.S.

title: Beyond the Hype: What Are Crypto Assets Actually Worth When the Bubble Bursts?
author: fintax
keyword: crypto assets tokenization value mechanism regulation cross-border payments
digest: This paper examines sustainable crypto asset value mechanisms through the lens of tokenization, macro hedging, and regulatory evolution, distinguishing between native and backed tokens that can survive market cycles.

title: Sun Yuchen and the SEC Settle Three-Year Dispute: TRON Case Reflects New Trends in US Crypto Regulation
author: fintax
keyword: SEC TRON Justin Sun settlement crypto regulation wash trading
digest: The SEC and Justin Sun reach a settlement in the TRON case after three years, with Rainberry accepting a $10M penalty for wash trading while all other charges are dismissed, reflecting the shifting US crypto regulatory landscape.

title: MetaMask Card Lands in the US: A New Game Changer for Crypto Payments
author: fintax
keyword: MetaMask Mastercard crypto payments self-custody debit card
digest: MetaMask partners with Mastercard to launch a self-custody crypto card in the US, allowing users to spend on-chain assets at 150M+ merchants while maintaining full control of their funds.

title: 从"执法监管"到"规则前置"：美国加密资产监管的范式转变与市场影响
author: fintax
keyword: 加密资产 SEC CFTC 数字商品 证券监管
digest: 2026年3月17日，SEC与CFTC联合发布加密资产分类指引，将加密资产划分为五大类别，创设剥离机制，标志着美国从执法监管转向规则前置的监管范式转变。

title: SEC与孙宇晨及TRON系实体达成和解：历时三年纠纷落定，加密监管释放新信号
author: FinTax
digest: SEC就针对孙宇晨、TRON基金会等的诉讼达成和解，Rainberry接受1000万美元罚金，SEC撤销其余指控。本文分析和解背后的监管逻辑与市场启示。

title: 全球加密货币监管前瞻：金融风险、数据治理和网络安全是规制重点
author: Julius Mutunkei
digest: 分析师预计 2024 年的重点领域将超出监管力度加大的总体趋势。他们预测，金融机构将制定更加强有力的风险管理框架，并提高资本和流动性要求，以反映当前的经济环境。此外，数据和人工智能在传统金融和加密货币领域的重要性不断上升，预计将增加全球加密货币监管中对数据治理和模型风险管理的需求。分析师还预计，可持续性以及环境、社会和治理（ESG）因素将在国际加密货币监管中占据更大的比重，而网络安全仍然是重中之重，因为数字资产平台仍然是黑客和诈骗者的目标。

title: How will the new president, Javier Milei, deal with cryptocurrency? Argentina Crypto Tax & Preview
author: TaxDAO
digest: The Argentine Republic (Spanish: República Argentina), commonly known as Argentina (Spanish: Argentina), is located in the south of South America, relying on abundant natural resources, Argentina has long practiced an economic model of exporting primary products and substituting imported industrial products. At the end of 2023, its inflation rate reached 211.4%, surpassing Venezuela's 193%, making it the fastest depreciating currency in Latin America. Against this backdrop, investing in cryptocurrencies has become the way most Argentines fight inflation, but the Argentine government has generally taken a wait-and-see approach to cryptocurrencies, and its crypto tax reform still needs a long process.

title: TaxDAO Annual White Paper_2024
author: TaxDAO
digest: At the end of 2023 and the beginning of 2024, TaxDAO compiles the research findings for industry practitioners, observers, and professionals to reference. As one of the few organizations dedicated to conducting research on Web3 tax, accounting, and regulatory policies, we are enthusiastic about utilizing our expertise and contributing to a path forward for industry compliance. The booming crypto assets and Web3 industry have made it increasingly impossible to ignore in economic activities, and its positive and negative impacts are also rapidly amplified. The two-way interaction between regulation and the industry has evolved from a small contact to a real-time collision and balance. Just like a strong belief in Bitcoin, digital citizens in the industry have an unwavering belief in the development of the industry. With the recent liquidation of Binance risks and the expectation of Bitcoin ETF applications, vigorous power has once again gathered upward. At the same time, we are keenly aware of the industry's urgent need for clarity on regulatory compliance. In the future, TaxDAO hopes to continue to export its views in the development of regulatory policy in various regions, especially in the area of tax and accounting policy - an area in which TaxDAO is naturally good at. The voice in this area represents our judgment on the trend of financial regulation, tax regulation and audit transparency in the next 5-10 years. We hope to do a good job of the existing work at the same time, develop a good commercial landing scene, to maintain the survival and active organization. In the future, TaxDAO will make every effort to explore the path of Web3 tax and financial compliance, and cooperate with the community to seek a stable and long-term industry development path.

title: TaxDAO年度白皮书_2024
author: TaxDAO
digest: 岁末年初，TaxDAO将本年的研究成果整理供行业从业者、观察者以及专业人士参考。作为少数专注于Web3税务、会计、监管政策研究的组织，我们非常兴奋能有这样的时代和行业机会利用专业所学，为开拓一条行业合规发展的必经之路做些许贡献。 加密资产和Web3行业的蓬勃发展使其在全球经济活动中变得越来越不可忽视，其正反两面影响也快速放大。监管与本行业的双向互动从开始的细微接触演变成实时碰撞和平衡。 就像信仰比特币一样，身处本行业的数字公民对行业的发展抱持着坚定不移的信仰。虽然在过去的一年我们经历过挫折，但伴随着近期币安风险的出清以及美国SEC对现货比特币ETF的批准，蓬勃的力量再一次向上积聚。行稳才能致远，我们深刻感受到行业对明晰监管合规的迫切需求。 TaxDAO希望未来在各地区监管政策的制定过程中持续输出观点，尤其是税务和会计政策领域——这是TaxDAO与生俱来所擅长的领域。在该领域的发声代表了我们对于未来5-10年金融监管、税务监管、审计透明趋势的判断。 我们希望在做好既有工作的同时，开拓有良好的商业化落地场景，保持组织的存续和活跃。未来TaxDAO将在Web3税务和财务合规的路径探索上倾尽全力，与社区共同协作，寻求稳定、长期的行业发展路径。
